appliedUpdates.description: Replaced adaptive polling with a fixed five-minute heartbeat fallback and preserved the delivery-loop query key shape.
Added exact `refetch:["delivery-loop"]` invalidation hook wiring without disturbing chat delta flow.
Locked the fixed heartbeat interval and dedupe behavior under in-flight invalidations.

summary: UI refactoring is complete. The delivery-loop surface is now event-driven with a fixed heartbeat fallback, explicit realtime invalidation targets only the stable delivery-loop query key, in-flight invalidations dedupe correctly, and delta streaming stays monotonic while those refetches occur.
